author: doll-agent
content: Change split() return type from Vec<Vec<String>> to StringArray<Ix2> with rows padded to max_parts via empty strings (#277). Add split_ragged() that keeps the original Vec<Vec<String>> form for callers that need the unpadded raggedness. Update lib.rs re-exports, AC4 test (now uses 2D shape), and property_tests.rs (uses split_ragged for the join roundtrip). 2 new tests in split_join: pads-short-rows-with-empty and split_ragged_returns_unpadded.
